sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { patientAPI, doctorAPI, appointmentAPI, billAPI } from '../services/api'; const Dashboard = () => { const [stats, setStats] = useState({ patients: 0, doctors: 0, appointments: 0, pendingBills: 0 }); const [recentAppointments, setRecentAppointments] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { fetchDashboardData(); }, []); const fetchDashboardData = async () => { try { const [patientsRes, doctorsRes, appointmentsRes, billsRes] = await Promise.all([ patientAPI.getAll(), doctorAPI.getAll(), appointmentAPI.getToday(), billAPI.getPending() ]); setStats({ patients: patientsRes.data.length, doctors: doctorsRes.data.length, appointments: appointmentsRes.data.length, pendingBills: billsRes.data.length }); setRecentAppointments(appointmentsRes.data.slice(0, 5)); } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching dashboard data:', error); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; if (loading) { return (
Loading...
); } return (

Total Doctors

{stats.doctors}

Today's Appointments

{stats.appointments}

Pending Bills

{/* Quick Actions & Recent Appointments */}
Quick Actions
Register Patient Book Appointment Generate Bill Write Prescription
Today's Appointments
View All
{recentAppointments.length === 0 ? (

No appointments scheduled for today

) : (
{recentAppointments.map((apt) => ( ))}
Time Patient ID Doctor ID Status
{apt.appointment_time} #{apt.patient_id} #{apt.doctor_id} {apt.status}
)}
{/* System Info */}
System Status
Online
Database
Connected
Version
v1.0.0
); }; export default Dashboard;
